title: Tool Registry, Allowlist, Validation, Dispatch, Results, and Unknown Calls · Program Brief: Tool Registry
summary: The dispatcher uses globals by name, trusts model arguments, drops call IDs, returns raw exceptions, retries effects, and invokes unknown tools through dynamic import. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the tool registry increment in allowlisted tool registry and result envelope. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, c…
objectives: Register immutable tool name, schema version, handler, effect class, policy, timeout, owner, and result contract in one auditable catalog.
Version tool contracts and provide compatibility, migration, deprecation, and replay tests for changed parameters and results.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-tool-registry — Register immutable tool name, schema version, handler, effect class, policy, timeout, owner, and result contract in one auditable catalog.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-registry-dispatch-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-registry-dispatch-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_tool_registry_dispatch_4(received_calls: int = 20, dispatched_calls: int = 14, rejected_calls: int = 6, correlated_results: int = 20, duplicate_dispatches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0:
        return False, received_calls, "dispatch-count"
    if dispatched_calls + rejected_calls != received_calls:
        return False, dispatched_calls, "dispatch-reconciliation"
    if correlated_results != received_calls:
        return False, correlated_results, "result-correlation"
    if duplicate_dispatches > 0:
        return False, duplicate_dispatches, "duplicate-dispatch"
    assert dispatched_calls + rejected_calls == received_calls and duplicate_dispatches == 0
    return True, dispatched_calls, "allowlisted-tool-dispatch"

        "toolcqqjrj",
        "statejrjqqc4564",
        "evaluation4564jrjqqc",
        "recoverycqqjrj4564",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_jrjqqc)) == 6
    if received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0:
        return False, received_calls, "dispatch-count"
    if dispatched_calls + rejected_calls != received_calls:
        return False, dispatched_calls, "dispatch-reconciliation"
    if correlated_results != received_calls:
        return False, correlated_results, "result-correlation"
    if duplicate_dispatches > 0:
        return False, duplicate_dispatches, "duplicate-dispatch"
    assert dispatched_calls + rejected_calls == received_calls and duplicate_dispatches == 0
    return True, dispatched_calls, "allowlisted-tool-dispatch"
